summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is ~40% complete. Task requires TDD (failing test first), fixture data, test harness, and act-result.txt artifact—none provided. Missing: test/bump.test.js (workflow line 18 references it), fixtures/ directory with .txt files, package.json (line 25 copies it), test harness script, act-result.txt. bump.js logic is solid (pure functions, good error handling), workflow structure reasonable (pinned actions, minimal perms), but incomplete requirements violate core task mandate. No evidence of actionlint validation or act testing.
